idea.title: Tank Forge
idea.hook: Forge a tank from Tetris blocks, then watch the blocks you placed BE the hit points — armor shears off chunk by chunk until the gun goes silent.
idea.prototype: Portrait two-phase loop: FORGE (drag Tetris-shaped blocks onto a tight grid; adjacency matters — ammo boosts adjacent cannons +25%, armor clusters add HP) then BATTLE (auto-fire wave corridor, drag to steer; enemies deal per-block damage, dead blocks shear off with physics debris and live stats drop). Scrap from kills buys new block types that keep unlocking through wave 10+ (flamer/ricochet/ram/drone); grid expands at waves 7/14; boss every 5th wave; daily crate + next-unlock teaser hooks.
idea.mutation_of: Block Tanks assembly archetype, distinct from 161_tank_blitz (assembly + per-block damage vs arena shooter)
idea.why_novel: first Phaser-stack factory build (ADR 0002 dual-stack A/B) and first build-your-vehicle game in the portfolio; the per-block damage model IS the catch
idea.non_timer_pressure: tank HP is the placed blocks themselves; losing blocks degrades dps/speed mid-fight

sources.title: Top profitable niches post — #2: 2D tanks (Tank Fury / Block Tanks, 1M+ players ~$30K)
sources.snippet: 2D tanks incl. Block Tanks — tanks with Tetris-like assembly mechanics

sources.title: ADR 0002 — dual stack: vanilla JS + Phaser path, A/B per new build
sources.snippet: Tim 2026-06-10: alternate stacks on new builds to A/B engagement/monetisation; Tank Forge chosen via AskUserQuestion as the first deliberate Phaser build

alternatives: School Tycoon idle (Phaser + idle pack) — queued as the next Phaser slot candidate
